title: erigeron coronarius var. durangensis
intro: Erigeron coronarius var. durangensis, also known as the Durango Fleabane, is a plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Erigeron coronarius var. durangensis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of ways.
